articles.title: Nadia: Woman Police Personnel Drinks Water Amid Heatwave #Gallery - Social News XYZ
articles.full_text:
Nadia: A woman police personnel takes a brief moment to drink water while on duty on a roadside amid intense heatwave conditions in Krishnanagar, Nadia district, West Bengal, on Thursday, June 04, 2026. (Photo: IANS)
